title: Big Globe - When Dungeons Arise Compatibility
description: Big Globe - When Dungeons Arise Compatibility
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-when-dungeons-arise-compatibility)

A compatibility mod/datapack for [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise) and [When Dungeons Arise: Seven Seas](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise-seven-seas), makes all structures generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))
